title: Lazy-sunday Ukrainian Water Borscht
description: A simplified Ukrainian Borscht recipe that celebrates minimal effort and delicious flavor. Just rest and let the veggies simmer in water.
instructions: Combine sliced beets, carrots, onions, and garlic in a large pot.
Add cold water, making sure all the vegetables are covered.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Add sliced potatoes and salt, and simmer for another 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Turn off the heat and let the soup rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill before serving.
Serve warm or at room temperature, depending on your preference.
Strain the soup if desired to remove excess water and achieve a thicker consistency.
Adjust seasoning as needed with salt to taste.
Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 3 months.
